key_insight_phrases.high_retention: Strong repeat {entity_col_label} engagement — sign of healthy cohorts
key_insight_phrases.low_retention: Low repeat {entity_col_label} activity — churn risk or one-time purchasing

caveats.low_row_count: Limited {entity_col_label} sample ({total_entities} entities) — rate may be unreliable
caveats.low_coverage_adequate: Data coverage is below optimal — repeat activity may be unmeasured
caveats.minimum_data_warning: Insufficient data — repeat rate may not be representative
